settings.title: Saituna
settings.appearance.description: Daidaita da na'urarka ko zaɓi bayyanar da kake so.
settings.language.description: Yi amfani da zaɓin harshe ɗaya a shafukan jama'a da na sirri.
settings.accessibility.description: A kiyaye rubutu mai karantawa, mayar da hankali ta madanni, da motsi mai tsabta.
settings.account.changePasswordDescripti: Shigar da tsohuwar kalmar sirri, sannan ka zaɓi sabuwa.
settings.account.currentPasswordRequired: Shigar da kalmar sirri ta yanzu.
settings.account.weakPassword: Yi amfani da kalmar sirri mai ƙarfi da haruffa 6 ko fiye.
settings.account.passwordMismatch: Sabbin kalmomin sirri ba su dace ba.
settings.account.passwordChangeFailed: Ba mu iya canza kalmar sirri yanzu ba.
settings.account.providerEmail: Imel / hanyar shiga da aka haɗa
settings.personalization.focusPreference: Aiki ɗaya mai muhimmanci a lokaci guda
settings.personalization.learningStyle: Salon koyon da aka fi so
settings.privacy.clearChatHistoryValue: Sarrafa hirarrakin da aka ajiye daga gefen hira
settings.privacy.aiMemoryControlsValue: Yana amfani da bayanan martaba da bayanan farawa
settings.data.savedPreferencesDescriptio: Ana ajiye bayyanar shafi da harshe a wannan burauzar. Harshen yanzu:
settings.data.cloudSyncDescription: Ana kuma ajiye zaɓin harsheka a bayanan martabarka idan daidaita bayanai na girgije yana samuwa.
settings.delete.title: A share asusunka?
settings.delete.description: Ba za a iya mayar da wannan aikin ba. Za a share hirarrakinka, bayanan martaba, da bayanan da aka ajiye gaba ɗaya.
settings.delete.failed: Ba mu iya share asusunka yanzu ba.
sidebar.recentDescription: Hirarraki 3 na ƙarshe. Yi amfani da Bincika Hirarraki don cikakken tarihi.
chat.continueJourney: Ci gaba da tafiyar koyonka daga inda ka tsaya.
public.signInToSave: Shiga don ajiye hirarrakinka, ayyuka, da ci gaba.
public.signInToSaveSuffix: don ajiye hirarrakinka, ayyuka, da ci gaba.
saved.title: Hirarrakin da aka Ajiye
roadmap.title: Taswirar Koyo
auth.loginDescription: Ci gaba zuwa hirarrakinka, horarwa, ayyuka, da ci gaba.
auth.redirecting: Ana mayar da kai zuwa dashboard...
auth.error.emailExists: Akwai asusu da wannan imel. Shiga maimakon haka.
auth.error.weakPassword: Yi amfani da kalmar sirri mai ƙarfi da haruffa 6 ko fiye.
auth.error.invalidCredential: Imel ko kalmar sirri ba daidai ba ne.
auth.error.popupBlocked: Burauzarka ta toshe taga shiga. Bada popups don wannan shafi sannan a sake gwadawa.
auth.error.providerDisabled: Ba a kunna wannan hanyar shiga ba tukuna a Firebase Authentication.
auth.error.unauthorizedDomain: Ba a ba wannan domain izini a saitunan Firebase Authentication ba.
auth.error.loginFailed: Ba mu iya shigar da kai ba. Sake gwadawa.
onboarding.profileDescription: Wannan yana taimaka wa DSIQ ya keɓance horarwarka, hanyar koyonka, da shawarwari.
onboarding.nicknameTaken: An riga an ɗauki wannan sunan. Gwada wani.
onboarding.agreementPrefix: Ta danna "Kammala ƙirƙirar asusu", ka amince da
onboarding.goalsTitle: Me kake son cimmawa da DSIQ?
onboarding.goalsDescription: Zaɓi duk abin da ya dace. DSIQ zai yi amfani da wannan don gina taswirar koyonka.
onboarding.successDescription: DSIQ ya shirya ya jagoranci koyonka, ƙwarewarka, ayyukanka, da damar ka.
onboarding.disclaimer: DSIQ na iya yin kuskure. Kada ka raba bayanai masu sirri.
